plugins.name: speculator
plugins.description: Speculator — spec quality scoring and a 7-gate pipeline (4 required + 3 opt-in: eval intent, eval quality, comprehension — each bindable to spec risk levels) with LLM-as-judge evaluation, git worktree isolation, and beads issue tracking. Includes asbuilt-quiz: a human-facing comprehension quiz generator built on the As-Built knowledge system. Quality In, Quality Out.

plugins.name: fable-mode
plugins.description: Fable 5's working discipline as a skill — a five-gate task loop (scope, evidence, adversarial reasoning, verification, calibrated reporting) for complex, multi-step, or uncertain work.
